title: Create Spider-Man themed website with depth effects

requirements.text: Create a hero section featuring Spider-Man with parallax scrolling depth effects that create visual layers as the user scrolls

quotes: Create a website all about Spider-Man with dept effects all all

acceptanceCriteria: Hero section displays Spider-Man imagery with multiple parallax layers
Scrolling creates visible depth effect with foreground and background moving at different speeds

requirements.text: Implement content sections about Spider-Man including his origin story, powers and abilities, key villains, and notable comic/movie appearances

quotes: Create a website all about Spider-Man

acceptanceCriteria: At least 4 distinct content sections with Spider-Man information
Each section is visually distinct and easy to navigate

requirements.text: Apply depth effects throughout the entire website using CSS transforms, shadows, and layering to create a 3D appearance across all sections
acceptanceCriteria: Multiple sections feature depth effects using shadows and transforms
Visual hierarchy creates sense of depth across the page
Effects are consistent with the overall Spider-Man theme

requirements.text: Design a cohesive visual theme inspired by Spider-Man's iconic red and blue color scheme with comic book aesthetics, incorporating bold typography, dynamic angles, and web-pattern details throughout the layout
acceptanceCriteria: Color scheme uses Spider-Man's signature red and blue palette
Typography and layout evoke comic book style
Web patterns or Spider-Man motifs appear as design elements
Overall aesthetic is consistent across all sections

required: Dynamic Spider-Man hero illustration in action pose with web-slinging motion against city skyline (spiderman-hero.dim_1920x1080.png)
Spider-Man mask icon in comic book style with bold outlines (spiderman-icon.dim_256x256.png)
Spider web pattern texture for background use with transparent areas (web-pattern.dim_800x800.png)
Comic-style cityscape background with buildings in perspective for depth effect (city-background.dim_1600x900.png)
